text:
Hello,

The primary site ftp.kvaleberg.com encounters frequent problems;
would it be possible to put the distfiles on ftp.freebsd.org?

Thanks.
-- 
Th. Thomas,                                     ICQ : 8823153
Learning French is trivial: the word for horse is cheval, and
everything else follows in the same way. (Alan J. Perlis)
